training_status: recreationally active, working out when energy allows
health_conditions: broken hip from car accident 5 years ago
shattered pelvis from car accident 5 years ago
chronic pain after vigorous weight bearing exercise

benefits.description: Drastic improvement in energy and endurance after 1 week on Tesa/Ipa stack; able to work out consistently again
At least 50% improvement in 5-year-old car wreck injuries (broken hip and shattered pelvis), especially after walking and jogging; reduced pain and limping
Improvement in waist and tummy area over 10-week cycle
Sleep improved at night when running GH peptides despite Tesa/Ipa being stimulating in the morning

side_effects.description: Constant fatigue from Tirz/Cagri combination prior to adding Tesa/Ipa
More water weight observed when increasing Tesamorelin dose to 1.5mg
Tesa/Ipa makes her wired if taken in the evening; pins at 5-6am to avoid sleep disruption

protocol_notes: Pins all compounds first thing in the morning (5-6am). Fasts until 2pm or later (intermittent fasting). Plans 12 weeks on / 12 weeks off or 8 on / 8 off. Dose escalated Tesamorelin from 1mg to 1.5mg at week 6. Considering CJC-no DAC / Ipamorelin for next cycle to save money. Considering adding Retatrutide at low dose. At week 10 of current cycle at time of later comments.
